content: Senior Python Engineer at a fintech scaleup. You will design and operate data pipelines in Python and PostgreSQL, mentor two junior engineers, and own the deployment workflow end to end. Remote within the EU on a permanent contract, salary 60 to 75k EUR. Experience with async Python and cloud infrastructure is strongly preferred for this role.

Backend Developer (Python and Django) for a public-sector health platform based in Stockholm. The role covers REST API design, relational database modelling, automated testing and regular code review. We offer flexible hours, occupational pension and thirty days of annual leave. Swedish working proficiency is required and the team works in English day to day.
Part-time cashier wanted for a downtown grocery store. Weekend shifts only and no previous experience necessary.
Summer internship for marketing students at a small regional advertising agency. Applications close at the end of May.
Warehouse picker for the night shift on a temporary three-month contract near the harbour district.
